title: IP Pinger
description: Server IP Pinger - Instantly see server IP and ping when joining multiplayer servers. Displays connection info directly in chat with colored formatting. Client-side only, works automatically.
body:
**Server IP Pinger**

A lightweight client-side mod that displays the server IP address and connection latency when joining multiplayer servers. 

**Features:**
- Automatically shows server IP and port in chat upon joining
- Displays real-time ping/latency measurement
- Color-coded chat message for easy visibility
- Works on any Minecraft server
- Client-side only - no server installation required

**Example output:**
`Server IP: 192.168.1.100:25565 | Ping: 45 ms`
